prestazioni: Engine swap to a **RF-T (2.0L turbocharged diesel, 130PS)** with a **Garrett GT2259S turbocharger** (hybrid compressor wheel, 0.60 A/R turbine housing) and **Sard 800cc injectors** for a target of 220PS at 4,000 RPM with 380Nm torque. Retain the stock **RF-T’s 16-valve SOHC** but port and polish the head with **Tomei 260° camshafts** and **Ferrea valve springs** to handle increased boost (1.2 bar via **HKS EVC6 boost controller**).

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **MagnaFlow** with a **4-2-1 header** (equal-length primaries) and **dual 3.5-inch straight-pipe exit** (no mufflers) to reduce backpressure. Pair with a **Diesel Particulate Filter (DPF) delete** and **AdBlue removal** via **ECU remap by Viezu Technologies** (Stage 2+ tune with EGR disable).

Suspension overhaul using **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** with **custom spring rates (6kg/mm front, 8kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro)** for the **Bongo’s unique leaf-spring rear setup**. Add **Whiteline 22mm front sway bar** and **custom-fabricated rear sway bar (24mm)** to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to **DBA 5000 Series rotors (vented, 295mm front/280mm rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit** (modified for Bongo Friendee’s **SK84 chassis**) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) and **extended steel rocker panels** for a 100mm wider track. Front bumper replaced with a **custom 3D-printed splitter** (ABS plastic, **50mm overhang**) and **canards (3 per side, 200mm length)** by **Aero Catch**.

**Full respray in Mazda’s original ‘Sunlight Silver Metallic’ (code 14K)** with **3M Matte Clear Coat** and **custom pinstriping (0.5mm width, ‘Racing Green’)** by **Kandy’s Kustoms**. Roof and bonnet wrapped in **Avery Dennison Gloss Black** for contrast. **LED headlight conversion (Morimoto XB LED bulbs)** with **custom HID projectors (35W, 6000K)** and **DRL strips (Philips Ultinon Pro9000)** integrated into the bumper.

**Interior stripped and reupholstered** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth, red/black)** mounted on **custom floor-mounted brackets** (replacing the stock bench). **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **custom leather-wrapped shift knob (short-throw, weighted 250g)**. **Full sound deadening (Dynamat Extreme)** and **custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly)** by **Custom Cages UK** with **harness bar for Schroth 4-point harnesses**.
